coverage.criterion: `docker compose --profile external up` (or documented equivalent) does not create `firefly-iii` or `postgres` containers
coverage.notes: bundled-firefly profile split (T-0109); Grafana port reset on external merge (T-0111); CI external-only + anti-combination guards (T-0113); US-0001 guide profile-only rule (T-0115); merged config asserts no postgres/firefly/firefly-iii services (T-0117); smoke step 7 ps services check (T-0118)

coverage.criterion: `flow-finance-ai` joins external `traefik` network and reaches `postgres` and `firefly` by Docker DNS
coverage.notes: Grafana traefik network on overlay (T-0111); runbook omniflow DNS/network section (T-0114); compose config asserts traefik membership, DATABASE_HOST=postgres, FIREFLY_BASE_URL=http://firefly:8080 (T-0117); smoke curl firefly + in-network /health (T-0118 steps 2, 4)

coverage.criterion: Traefik routes `https://financegnome.omniflow.cc` to Flow Finance AI with `auth` middleware and valid TLS
coverage.notes: Env-parameterized Traefik labels with defaults (T-0110); TRAEFIK_HOST/TRAEFIK_MIDDLEWARE in .env.example (T-0112); runbook Traefik overrides + AC-6 table (T-0114); operator guide public URL + basic-auth note (T-0116); smoke HTTPS /health with auth and 401 without (T-0118 steps 5–6)

coverage.criterion: Backend `/health` returns success when wired to external DB and Firefly PAT is configured
coverage.notes: PAT and DB vars documented in .env.example (T-0112); runbook prerequisites (T-0114); user guide /health + PAT (T-0116); merged config DNS/env validation (T-0117); smoke PAT non-empty, in-network and public /health, migration log check (T-0118 steps 3–4, 8)

coverage.criterion: `.env.example` documents all operator-required variables for external mode
coverage.notes: Omniflow block expansion with COMPOSE_FILE, profiles, Traefik, Grafana gate, OIDC, TimescaleDB bootstrap (T-0112); operator guide mirrors required vs optional vars (T-0116)

coverage.criterion: Operator smoke test recorded (compose up + health + Traefik route check on Debian host)
coverage.notes: Runbook eight-step AC-6 table (T-0114); UAT checklist in US-0010 guide (T-0116); dedicated smoke-evidence.md recording with host-unavailable blocker path (T-0118)

advisories.note: AC-3 TLS and AC-4/AC-6 runtime checks depend on Debian omniflow host availability during T-0118; tasks allow PENDING evidence with documented blocker — acceptable for plan-verify, must be closed at QA/verify-work.
AC-1 acceptance text allows single-profile `external up`; sprint canonical path is two-file merge per DEC-0056 — covered as documented equivalent in T-0114/T-0116.
